message:
Spec: deep audit fixes for §5.6.2 + §7.11

- TxnSlot _padding: [u8; 52] → [u8; 48] (repr(C) layout yields 80B of
  fields before padding; 52 gave 132B total, breaking 128B slot stride
  in shared-memory array indexing)
- §7.11.2: request.mode → TxnSlot.mode lookup via request.txn
  (PublishRequest has no mode field)
- §7.11.1 step 6: clarify group-commit semantics — writer writes symbols
  without fsync; coordinator's FSYNC_1 is the durability point for all
  batched capsule symbols
- §7.11.1 step 6: K_total + margin → K_source + R (use defined terms
  from §3.4.3)
- Critical ordering diagram updated to reflect write-not-fsync semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
